content.hint: 用表示少量时间的短语回应，体现积极态度
content.situation: 游客在徒步途中感到疲惫，想询问是否很快有休息点
content.speakerText: I'm really tired—can we take a break soon?
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很累了，我们能很快休息一下吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 表达即将发生的休息时间（常用短语）
content.responseTemplate: We'll reach a rest spot in ___ minutes.

content.hint: 表达‘不参与’时，用哪个词最自然且符合口语习惯？
content.situation: 导游告知景点有额外收费，游客想确认是否必须支付
content.speakerText: There's an optional donation at the viewpoint—no one forces you to pay.
content.speakerTextCn: 观景台有个自愿捐款项目，没人强迫你付钱。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达选择不支付额外费用的常用动词
content.responseTemplate: I'll ___ it then—I don't have extra cash on me.

content.hint: 免费饮水点的常见英文表达是什么？注意与售卖设备区分
content.situation: 游客在景区外想确认是否有免费饮水点，避免购买昂贵饮料
content.speakerText: Is there anywhere free to refill our water bottles around here?
content.speakerTextCn: 这里附近有可以免费加水的地方吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 描述公共免费饮水设施的准确词汇
content.responseTemplate: Yes, there's a ___ just ahead by the entrance.

content.hint: 在旅游场景中兑换货币的常用动词
content.template: Is there a place nearby to ___ cash?

content.scenarioHint: 游客在长途步行后感到疲惫，想礼貌地询问是否可以安排休息点
content.responseTemplate: Could we take a short break soon? ___

blanks.answer: I'm starting to get really tired
options: I'm starting to get really tired
I want to sit down now

content.hint: 用身体感受表达需求，语气礼貌但明确，避免命令式表达
content.knowledgePoint: 用身体感受表达合理请求

content.scenarioHint: 游客听到可能有额外费用，想确认是否需要额外支付并表达自己的财务状况
content.responseTemplate: Will there be any extra charges? ___

options: I don't have a credit card
I prefer to pay in cash
Is it included in the tour?

content.hint: 表达财务限制时，用委婉但清晰的方式说明情况，避免直接拒绝
content.knowledgePoint: 委婉表达财务限制以避免尴尬
